text:

Author: jhibbits

Log:
  Force all TOC references in asm to include '@toc'

  This reportedly fixes one problem with booting a clang kernel.

  Submitted by:	Mark Millard <markmi AT dsl-only.net>
  MFC after:	2 weeks
